channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: BBC apologizes after racial slur shouted during BAFTA awards by guest with Tourette's
item.description: BAFTA and the BBC have apologized after a person with Tourette syndrome shouted a racial slur during the British Academy Film Awards

item.title: WATCH: Smoke blankets Mexico's Puerto Vallarta after death of cartel leader
item.description: Widespread violence erupted after a cartel boss was killed in a military raid.

item.title: EU diplomats scramble to overcome Hungary’s threat to derail new sanctions on Russia
item.description: Hungary is blocking the EU’s latest sanctions plan against Russia, and it is also holding up new aid for Ukraine four years after Russia invaded.

item.title: 25 Mexican National Guard troops left dead in operation that killed cartel leader
item.description: Mexico Security Secretary Omar García Harfuch says 25 members of the National Guard were left dead in Jalisco in six separate attacks after the killin...

item.title: Snowfall intensifies in Northeast, with many stuck at home under blizzard warnings and travel bans
DHS says TSA PreCheck operational after announcing suspension amid shutdown
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said in a statement that TSA and Customs and Border Protection are "suspending courtesy and special privilege ...

item.title: How to use (and not use) a home equity loan this spring, according to experts
item.description: Home equity loans this spring may be smart in some scenarios, but ill-advised in others. Here's what to consider.

item.title: WATCH: Controversy erupts at BAFTA awards
item.description: The BBC is apologizing to BAFTA viewers after several obscene outbursts from Tourette’s activist John Davidson were heard on the broadcast.

item.title: Partial government shutdown begins to slam DHS travel operations
item.description: The partial government shutdown is impacting funding for the Department of Homeland Security and affecting services for air travellers. CBS News' Taur...

item.title: Chicagoans in Puerto Vallarta describe unrest after killing of Jalisco cartel leader
item.description: Some Chicago-area residents currently in Puerto Vallarta recounted hearing explosions and saw thick black smoke billowing from cars and businesses thr...

item.title: 2/22/2026: Left Behind; South Africa's Refugees; Is That Art?
item.description: First, a report from inside the birthplace of food stamps. Then, inside Trump’s South Africa Afrikaner claims. And, the AI art divide: Revolutionary o...

item.title: Blizzard live updates: Monster storm dropping 3 inches of snow per hour
item.description: A massive winter storm is ripping across the Northeast, dumping more than 1 foot of snow.

item.title: Prosecutors stand by former militant’s conviction but blast judge’s prior conduct as prosecutor
